epigraph.quote: Sunshine flooded the camping van at breakfast.

per_stop.quote: Beautiful linen fold panelling, paint colour in rooms good, welcoming. Well worth a visit.
They have put us in the fireplace again.
We got to the Tunnel an hour early & they put us onto the next train - ahead of the Bank Holiday weekend.
A lovely, au warm evening walk in the Sunshine. There's an Irishman in the camp who sits in his car all day.
We managed a 14½ mile walk to Treignac lake – gorgeous old roads + scenery.
A beautiful meadow with the sound of a river.
It was fascinating & very interesting. Dreadful conditions for women.
The hotel room was nice. It looked onto the Rhône.
we motor-wayed to Lyons & spent an hour trying to find a parking place without Success.
A really good meal in our hotel de la Paix.
We're now at St. Jean de Vaux. The sun is shining, although there might be thunder.
We went the wrong way north & ended up driving on a beautiful road.
We reached Roksell Farm & William joined us for lunch.
Lovely window of Adam Delving. We liked the undercroft.
Nana took Simon to an Indian concert.
